name: PER_MEDICAL_ASSESSMENTS
description: This table stores the medical assessments for the person.

columns.Name: MEDICAL_ASSESSMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person for whom the medical assessment is recorded

columns.Name: EXAMINER_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of examiner who performed consultation

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Organization in which this assessment came about. Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CONSULTATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of medical consultation

columns.Name: CONSULTATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of medical assessment

columns.Name: CONSULTATION_RESULT
columns.Comments: Result of medical assessment

columns.Name: DISABILITY_ID
columns.Comments: Disability referenced by this assessment. Foreign key to PER_WORK_INCIDENTS

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Incident referenced by this assessment. Foreign key to PER_WORK_INCIDENTS

columns.Name: NEXT_CONSULTATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of next medical assessments

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of medical assessment

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
